textPlain: I find it mildly amusing that the OP tried to filter out the NSFW ones, but the very first example on the page features a very large ejaculating penis.
This went into quite a bit more detail than just how the mosaic was animated. That was a nice surprise, a thoughtful summary of several things that went into the project.
That would be a great screensaver. Also, one that's only NSFW would be cool.
A very quick, pleasing read. And it's got a nice aesthetic.

Related to this post, does anyone know why this post says "3 hours ago" but upon hovering on the timestamp, it has an older date? The title attribute is set to:    title="2025-09-16T03:32:43 1757993563"

Summoning @dang
I reloaded the page and realized the first example seems to change on reload, so YMMV.

See https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=43162211 and the links back from there and let us know if you still have a question.(p.s. @dang is pretty much a no-op - for more reliable message delivery you need to email hn@ycombinator.com - see https://news.ycombinator.com/newsguidelines.html)
